name: police Stick man Fighting Game
description: Get ready for the global wrestling fight to demonstrate the power of heavyweight champion and use all fighting skills to defeat your opponents in best free stickman wrestling game. Thrill the crowd with your stickman wrestling style in fighting club. Improve your fighting skills and become the best fighter in the world. Become a champion of professional stickman wrestlers in this world fighting club stickman wrestling game. Survive in ring by not giving your rivals a chance to win, fight heavy fighters and improve your skills at the highest level to win the stickman wrestling match.
instructions: Please use A S D Z X for action
